notes.paper_regularization: Clark et al. report lambda=1e-6. This local reproduction uses lambda=1e-4 consistently across Figure 3A-L because the extracted finite-N inverse-softplus target is unstable at 1e-6.
notes.parameter_policy: Figure 3 scripts must read defaults from this file. Any experimental override must be explicit and is recorded in the output cache.
notes.velocity_binning: For the shared lambda=1e-4 network, 1 s is the smallest tested A3707 angular-velocity bin that remains stable; 0.1, 0.2, and 0.5 s bins contain 3-6 rad/s measurement-scale peaks and destabilize panel K. Panel L independently retains the paper-specified 100 ms spike-count bins.
